lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Do you seek passage to holy Entrana? If so, you must leave your weaponry and armour behind. This is Saradomin's will.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not right now.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, okay, I'm ready to go.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Very well. One moment please.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: [I'm sorry, sir,/I'm sorry, madam,/I'm sorry,] but no weapons or armour may be worn on Entrana. This rule even forbids items dedicated to Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: NO WEAPONS OR ARMOUR are permitted on holy Entrana AT ALL. We will not allow you to travel there in breach of mighty Saradomin's edict.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Do not try and deceive us again. Come back when you have laid down your Zamorakian instruments of death.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: What's in this strange impling jar then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. It could be anything.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Well, I will assume that 'anything' includes weapons and armour. So come back when you've got rid of them.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: What's in this strange crate then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. It could be anything.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Well, I will assume that 'anything' includes weapons and armour. So come back when you've got rid of them.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: All is satisfactory. You may board the boat now.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Do you wish to leave holy Entrana?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm ready to go.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Okay, let's board...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not just yet.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: NO WEAPONS OR ARMOUR are permitted on holy Entrana AT ALL. We will not allow you to travel there in breach of mighty Saradomin's edict.

lines.speaker: Monk of Entrana
lines.text: Do not try and deceive us again. Come back when you have laid down your Zamorakian instruments of death.
